basics.name: Marcelo Rondon
basics.label: Product Designer
basics.summary: Product designer focused on systems, technical prototypes, and frontend-aware UX. I use code to clarify product behavior, constraints, and handoff details so teams can move from ambiguity to buildable solutions.

work.name: Asheville Dispensary
highlights: Designed and built reusable UI components integrated into WordPress via custom PHP and JavaScript plugins.
Designed and developed an internal asset-management tool using React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.
Created a scalable Figma design system to improve brand coherence across web, print, and packaging.
Collaborated with design, marketing, and operations partners to translate ambiguous needs into shipped product surfaces.
Used Git workflows with branching, merging, and pull requests to stay close to engineering constraints and delivery practices.

work.name: VegAvengers Marketing
highlights: Designed and built a responsive discovery experience with backend-integrated searchable components for VegFests and animal sanctuaries.
Translated mission, content structure, and UI/UX direction into maintainable React/TypeScript product surfaces.

work.name: ADA Compliance Consulting
highlights: Improved WCAG 2.1 compliance across multiple organizations, with attention to screen-reader behavior, keyboard navigation, and accessible interaction patterns.
Contracted with River Phoenix Center for Peacebuilding on accessibility and performance improvements.

work.name: Legal Impact For Chickens
highlights: Developed secure internal tooling for data-management workflows; handled confidential materials with discretion.

work.name: The Green Phial
highlights: Redesigned and maintained a WordPress site using HTML5, CSS3, PHP, and JavaScript.
Translated UI direction into responsive, accessible front-end implementation; improved performance and SEO.
Collaborated directly with the brand owner to align site structure, visual direction, and UX goals.

work.name: Mantera Advertising Agency
highlights: Collaborated with retail clients to design visually impactful campaign and marketing materials under tight deadlines.
Incorporated client feedback through fast iteration cycles while preserving quality and delivery timelines.
Facilitated direct communication with clients to clarify goals, constraints, and final design direction.

work.name: Success Academy Charter Schools
highlights: Designed remote learning experiences for ELA and math using structured learning frameworks.
Produced educational content and visual aids, applying design thinking to improve comprehension and engagement.

work.name: The Fine Print Magazine
highlights: Led a team of photographers and directed visual coverage for editorial stories and events.
Developed visual direction for fundraising events, using photography and design to improve visibility and engagement.

projects.name: Ghosted
projects.description: Designed and built an AI-assisted workflow product to help technical job seekers manage fragmented applications, documents, interviews, and follow-ups through one local-first product model.
highlights: Full-featured Terminal User Interface with vim-style navigation and keyboard shortcuts
Scriptable CLI interface designed for AI agent integration with JSON I/O
Multi-agent pipeline for automated document generation and job application workflow
Document compilation system converting Typst files to PDFs with smart naming
Job board integration fetching postings from Lever, Greenhouse, Workday, LinkedIn
